title: observation.captured.v1 payload
description: Payload of the observation.captured.v1 event â€” notification that chatgpt-observer-service captured a PlatformObservation. Thin notification projection of domain/platform-observation; never carries the raw response/screenshot inline (contract-catalog.md P1 'PlatformObservation' row: 'rawëŠ” object refë§Ś').
$comment: compat_class: open (event payload, ADR-0012/ADR-0024). Authority: docs/architecture/wave4-plan.md 'Existing vs new events' (w4-10 Contracts Steward deliverable â€” team-lead field list 'engine_id=chatgpt-search, observation id, artifact/snapshot content-addressed ref hash, NO raw response/screenshot in payload'); docs/architecture/api-event-contracts.md CONFIRMED topic list (observation.captured.v1); packages/contracts/asyncapi/saena-events/v1/asyncapi.yaml channel (already CONFIRMED envelope-only P1-deferred, x-saena-engine-id-required: true â€” this schema fills the payload); services/acquisition/chatgpt-observer-service/README.md (documents this event's payload builder as 'deliberately deferred' pre-W4 â€” this unit lands it). engine_id REQUIRED per ADR-0013, composed via allOf $ref to common/engine-id/v1's engine_required_payload activation fragment (NOT redeclared inline). artifact_hash is the sole ledger anchor for the captured snapshot/artifact (mirrors repo-intaken.content_hash pattern â€” the object's own URI lives on domain/platform-observation.raw_object_ref, not duplicated here, same event/domain split as repo-intaken vs domain/source-snapshot).

observation_id.$comment: Opaque identifier for the captured PlatformObservation record, mirrors common/identifiers/v1 opaque-id shape but not promoted there (not a CONFIRMED core business identifier).

artifact_hash.$comment: Content-addressed hash of the captured artifact/snapshot (sole ledger anchor, mirrors repo-intaken.content_hash) â€” NO raw response/screenshot content in this payload.
